home.title: Raseef | Flexible On-Demand Warehouse Space
home.description: Raseef is the leading platform for flexible warehouse storage spaces for businesses and enterprises.

hero.description: A leading platform for flexible warehouse storage spaces for companies and organizations. No long-term contracts. Pay only for the space you need.

howItWorks.title: How does Raseef work?
howItWorks.description: Four simple steps separate you from finding the ideal storage space for your business.

steps.title: Define your need
steps.description: Enter required space, storage type, and duration.

steps.title: Choose a warehouse
steps.description: Compare available options and select what fits your budget and location.

steps.title: Confirm booking
steps.description: Sign electronically and pay quickly and securely.

steps.title: Start storing
steps.description: Move your goods in and manage inventory through your dashboard.

warehouseOptions.title: Storage solutions for every need
warehouseOptions.description: We offer a wide range of storage options designed for different industry requirements.

items.title: Dry Storage
items.details: Warehouses equipped with top safety and security standards for goods that do not require temperature control.

items.title: Chilled & Frozen Storage
items.details: Advanced chilled and frozen rooms that protect food and pharmaceuticals under strict regulations.

items.title: Air-Conditioned Storage
items.details: Climate-controlled spaces suited for electronics, cosmetics, and heat-sensitive materials.

items.title: Pallet Storage
items.details: Rent by pallet and pay only for the actual footprint your goods occupy.

items.title: Order Handling & Fulfillment
items.details: Receiving, sorting, packing, and preparing orders for direct end-customer delivery.

items.title: Flexible Contracts
items.details: Eliminate long-contract constraints with space that adapts to seasonal peaks and demand shifts.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose
whyChooseUs.description: We do more than provide storage space. We deliver a reliable logistics partner to support growth and lower operating costs.
reasons: Flexible contracts with no long-term commitments
Fast onboarding and storage activation within 24 hours
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Suitable for small, medium, and large businesses

featuredWarehouses.title: Ready-to-store spaces
featuredWarehouses.description: Explore selected premium warehouses currently available on our platform.

testimonials.title: Trusted by growing businesses
testimonials.description: We are proud of our clients' trust and continuously deliver better storage solutions to support their growth.

items.name: Ahmed Abdullah
items.content: Raseef transformed the way we manage inventory. We no longer need costly annual contracts and can rent space based on seasonal demand.

items.name: Sara Khalid
items.content: My experience with Raseef has been excellent. Finding chilled storage and finalizing contracts quickly helped us expand to new cities.

items.name: Mohammed Al Omar
items.content: Transparent pricing and diverse certified warehouse options made Raseef our primary logistics partner.

finalCta.description: Join hundreds of companies relying on Raseef to manage warehouse space with flexibility and efficiency. Start now and stop fixed costs from limiting your growth.

footer.description: The leading platform for flexible warehouse storage in Saudi Arabia. We connect warehouse owners with businesses looking for storage space.
